business_ideas.idea: Ready-made cocktail shots at liquor store counter tops for impulse purchase, called Quickies
Rent liquor store counter tops in mass, then sell counter space to CPG brands like Nabisco
Pickle company; address marketing gap in fragmented pickle market, 75% of Americans eat pickles

predictions.text: Liquor store market will consolidate and provide ad/CPG opportunity, most fragmented retail channel today
